name: com.crumpetlabs.buttr.unity
description: Unity bridge for Buttr — a lightweight dependency-injection container. Adds MonoBehaviour, ScriptableObject, and scene-walking integration on top of the engine-agnostic Buttr.Core assemblies. The Core DLLs are supplied by the com.crumpetlabs.buttr dependency rather than vendored inline.

samples.description: A minimal but complete feature: a clamped health value, a UI Toolkit bar, and the boot to inject to Service to View loop.
